title: microseris pulchella
intro: Microseris pulchella, also known as the Western golden daisy or Western silver daisy, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Microseris pulchella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Microseris pulchella can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
